title: festuca dertonensis var. broteri
intro: Festuca dertonensis var. broteri is a variety of the Festuca dertonensis grass, commonly known as a type of fescue grass, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Festuca dertonensis var. broteri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
